name: mlgcn_qwen2_default
cmd: venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts/18_train_mlgcn.py --train_rows_json data/processed/splits/train_rows.json --val_rows_json data/processed/splits/val_rows.json --test_rows_json data/processed/splits/test_rows.json --model_id mlgcn --protocol timing --run_id mlgcn_timing --gpu_id 0 --epochs 25 --lr 1e-3 --seed 42

name: vlm_mlp_qwen2_default
cmd: venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts/06_run_baseline_mlp.py --train_rows_json data/processed/splits/train_rows.json --val_rows_json data/processed/splits/val_rows.json --test_rows_json data/processed/splits/test_rows.json --model_id vlm_mlp --protocol timing --run_id vlm_mlp_timing --gpu_id 0 --epochs 25 --lr 1e-3 --seed 42

name: qformer_qwen2_default
cmd: venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts/17_train_qformer_adapter.py --train_rows_json data/processed/splits/train_rows.json --val_rows_json data/processed/splits/val_rows.json --test_rows_json data/processed/splits/test_rows.json --model_id qformer_adapter --protocol timing --run_id qformer_timing --gpu_id 0 --epochs 30 --lr 3e-4 --num_queries 32 --seed 42
